footer.tagline: Fethiye's oldest beef confit house. The same wood fire, for 30 years.

mehmetUsta.heroSubtitle: A 40-year story around a single fire
story: In 1985, at just 12 years old, he stepped into his father's kitchen. He grew up in 1980s Fethiye, surrounded by copper pans and the sounds of wood fire. He stirred his first kavurma in those years.
Mehmet Usta began this craft in 1994, in a small butcher's shop on a narrow Fethiye street. He learned to pick beef from his father; the language of wood, he taught himself over the years.
The smell of oak firewood pulled him in from day one. When he opened his first counter, he plated just three portions a day. Today, the same care goes into hundreds of plates.
Every morning he still stands at the fire. Every confit plate leaves his hands, and nothing goes to the table until he has tasted it himself.
Fethiye Kavurmacısı isn't just a restaurant — it is the story of Mehmet Usta's 40 years of patience, passion and hospitality.

apprentice.title: Apprenticeship Years
apprentice.desc: 12 years old, in his father's kitchen. The journey that began in Ödemiş with copper pans.

master.title: Becoming a Master
master.desc: Over the years, he masterfully combined grill, köfte and traditional Turkish cuisine techniques.

today.title: Fethiye Kavurmacısı
today.desc: At his own grill in Fethiye, carrying 40 years of experience to every plate.

meat.title: Choosing the meat
meat.desc: Only local, fresh beef. Hand-picked every morning at the Fethiye butcher.

oak.title: Oak firewood
oak.desc: Wood cut from Muğla's oak forests. Only oak understands the language of fire.

patience.title: Patience
patience.desc: At least 6 hours on a slow fire. I don't believe in kavurma that's in a hurry.

copper.title: Copper Pan
copper.desc: Our kavurma is cooked and served in traditional hand-hammered copper pans, which distribute heat evenly and preserve the essence of the meat. We've carried this secret for 30 years.

mehmetUsta.quote: Kavurma is a labor of patience. Where there is no effort, there is no flavor.
mehmetUsta.ctaDesc: Get in touch to taste what Mehmet Usta cooks by hand — WhatsApp or phone works best.
